Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Wayde van Niekerk begins quest for 200m gold TODAY: Here’s when

A new week – but a busy one – lies ahead for Team South Africa at the Paris Olympics 2024. Here’s when Wayde van Niekerk will run …

A new week – but a busy one – lies ahead forTeam South Africaat theParis Olympics 2024.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

South Africa started the day with four medals with Tatjana Smith (gold and silver) and the men’s sevens rugby and Alan Hatherly (bronze) putting them in a tie for 29th place on the overall table.

On Monday, all eyes will be on the athletics track asWayde van Niekerkstarts his quest for a 200m medal at19:55(SA time).

Van Niekerk, who opted not to run the 400m in which he is the world record holder, is one ofthreeSouth Africans entered into the half-lap race.

Benjamin Richardsonwill run his heat at20:09(SA time), withShaun Maswanganigoing off at20:23(SA time).

Prudence Sekgodisocould well add to Team South Africa’s medal tally in the final of the women’s 800m at21:47(SA time).

Don’t miss it!

There is alsosport climbingon the menu.

For the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section for free-to-read content

Men’s discus qualification, Group A (10:10):Francois Prinsloo

Men’s discus qualification, Group A (11:35):Victor Hogan

Women’s 400m heats (12:35):Miranda Coetzee

Men’s 200m heats (19:55):Wayde van Niekerk

Men’s 200m heats (20:09):Benjamin Richardson

Men’s 200m heats (20:23):Shaun Maswangani

Women’s 800m final (21:47):Prudence Sekgodiso

Men’s boulder & Lead, semi-final boulder (10:00):Mel Janse van Rensburg

Women’s speed qualification seeding heats (13:00):Aniya Holder
